failedAssertions.reason: Contract requires business validation errors to use structured ApplicationException/ErrorCode only. Current shared validation path throws raw IllegalArgumentException/IllegalStateException, so assertion does not satisfy contract semantics.

Shared framework exists and is used, but idempotency-related hashing/signature logic is still duplicated in module code paths; assertion requirement of no module-local copy-paste logic is not fully met.
Shared utility exists but key common validation operations are not adopted broadly; duplicated per-service validation helpers indicate assertion criteria is not satisfied.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: api section with isolation and evidence expectations for parallel flow validators.
Documented Maven settings-path friction and explicit --settings workaround for invocations outside erp-domain.
